chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-745 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 03.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Khalique Kalhoro, Advocate a/w Petitioner No.1. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel after consultation with the petitioner does not wish to press this petition for the time being and submits that the petitioners may be allowed to file afresh, if so advised. Other side has no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
